headline: Looking Back On Pokemon's 25th Anniversary: Trading Cards, Video Games And Happy Meals
summary: Over the weekend, Pokemon celebrated its 25th anniversary. The idea of “pocket monsters” has led the Japanese franchise into successful trading card games, video games, television shows, movies and licensing opportunities.

headline: Walmart Hires 2 Goldman Sachs Bankers To Lead New Fintech Venture
summary: Walmart has lured two Goldman Sachs bankers to help run its new, as-of-yet-unnamed fintech venture.

headline: Tony Zhang's Apple Trade
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Tony Zhang suggested investors should consider a bullish options trade in Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL).

headline: Attention Biotech Investors: Mark Your Calendar For March PDUFA Dates
summary: Most Food and Drug Administration decisions scheduled for February were positive, and more importantly five new molecular entities passed FDA muster.

headline: Goldman Sachs Consumer Chief Omer Ismail is Leaving to Join Walmart
Benzinga's Weekly Bulls And Bears: Airbnb, Apple, Kroger, Starbucks, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker, the leading electric vehicle maker and a couple of reopening plays.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Berkshire Hathaway, Citigroup, Dow, Twitter And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story explores how investors can benefit from the shift to green energy.
	Other featured articles discuss value stocks to ride the economic recovery, what the spike in bond yields means for stocks, and tech stocks resisting the sector downturn.

headline: Xpeng To Release New P7 Sedan With Lithium Iron Phosphate Battery March 3: Report
summary: Chinese electric vehicle maker Xpeng Inc – ADR (NYSE: XPEV) will likely launch a new version of its P7 sedan as soon as next week.
